parameters.jsCode: const b=$json.body||$json; const children=b.children||[]; const completed=children.filter(x=>x.status==='completed').length; const failed=children.filter(x=>x.status==='failed').length; const cancelled=children.filter(x=>x.status==='cancelled').length; const started=new Date(b.started_at||Date.now()).getTime(); const finished=Date.now(); let status='completed'; if(cancelled>0) status='cancelled'; else if(failed>0) status=b.compensated?'compensated':'failed'; return [{json:{...b,event:'WORKFLOW_FINALIZING',status,summary:{children:children.length,completed,failed,cancelled,retries:b.retries||0,cost:b.cost||0,duration_ms:Math.max(0,finished-started)},finished_at:new Date(finished).toISOString(),execution_lock_key:b.execution_lock_key||`runtime:${b.company_id}:${b.execution_id}`}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { company_id:$json.company_id, workflow_uuid:$json.workflow_uuid, execution_id:$json.execution_id, trace_id:$json.trace_id, correlation_id:$json.correlation_id, status:$json.status, duration_ms:$json.summary.duration_ms, retries:$json.summary.retries, cost:$json.summary.cost, payload:$json.summary } }}
={{ { company_id:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.company_id, key:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.execution_lock_key, owner:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.request_id } }}

={{ { event:'WORKFLOW_FINALIZED', company_id:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.company_id, workflow_uuid:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.workflow_uuid, execution_id:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.execution_id, request_id:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.request_id, status:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.status, finished_at:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.finished_at, summary:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.summary } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok:true, execution_id:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.execution_id, status:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.status, summary:$('Aggregate Final Result').item.json.summary } }}
